metadata.title: Another Barbershop | Premium Barbershop in București
metadata.description: Another Barbershop in București - Not about hype, just doing things right. Expert haircuts, beard trims, and grooming services by skilled barbers with 6+ years experience.
metadata.ogImageAlt: Another Barbershop - Premium Barbershop in București

about.label: About
about.title: We don't promise. We deliver.
about.description: Another Barbershop isn't about hype or passing trends. It's about doing things right, every single time. Come for the cut, stay for the experience.

services.label: Services
services.title: What we offer
services.description: Simple services, flawlessly executed. Drinks on us.

haircut.name: Haircut
haircut.description: Cut, wash & styling. Drinks on us.

medium-long-haircut.name: Medium/Long Haircut
medium-long-haircut.description: Cut, wash & styling. Drinks on us.

beard.name: Beard
beard.description: Beard trim and shape-up. Drinks on us.

hair-and-beard.name: Hair & Beard
hair-and-beard.description: Full grooming: haircut, beard trim, wash & styling.

medium-long-hair-beard.name: Medium/Long Hair & Beard
medium-long-hair-beard.description: Full grooming: haircut, beard trim, wash & styling.

trim.name: Trim
trim.description: Buzz cut (single guard) or line-up. Drinks on us.

beard-trim.name: Beard & Trim
beard-trim.description: Buzz cut (single guard) & beard trim. Drinks on us.

team.label: Team
team.title: Who we are
team.description: Experienced barbers, passionate about their craft.

quotes.ana: A decade of experience means knowing exactly what you need.
quotes.mihi: Every client deserves to walk out feeling ready for anything.
quotes.andrei: Good music, steady hands, no rush. That's how we work here.

atmosphere.title: The Atmosphere
atmosphere.description: The vibe that keeps you coming back.

footer.description: The kind of place you come back to.
